title: Spicy Leek Stir Fry
description: A quick and comforting Korean-inspired stir fry with spicy kick and tender leeks.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the leek and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the spicy Korean chili flakes and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Add the soy sauce and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
6. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
7. Remove from heat and garnish with green onions.
